title: Categorical Encoding Path
description: Build fluency in Categorical Encoding inside Clustering by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Cyclical LR (Exp)
steps.summary: Cyclical LR (Exp) belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Clustering / Categorical Encoding. Compare it with Cyclical LR (Tri2) and Cyclical Cosine LR. It opens into Cyclical LR (Triangular, Tri2, Exp).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Cyclical LR (Tri2)
steps.summary: Cyclical LR (Tri2) belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Clustering / Categorical Encoding. Compare it with Cyclical LR (Exp) and Cyclical Cosine LR. It opens into Cyclical LR (Triangular, Tri2, Exp).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Cyclical Cosine LR
steps.summary: Cyclical Cosine LR belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Clustering / Categorical Encoding. Compare it with Cyclical LR (Tri2) and Cyclical LR (Exp).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
